roundup.titleFormula: Number + power adjective + exact keyword + audience/benefit

images.copyrightStance: owner-accepted: any web image may be rehosted as long as source credit + link is shown on the image, and the site carries a general disclaimer that images are sourced from around the web with credit given. Decided 2026-07-09, owner's explicit risk call — not a legal opinion.

opportunityRubricWeights._note: Not read by code — reference only, must match .claude/skills/keyword-research/SKILL.md (source of truth). competition is a MULTIPLIER on the base score (a gate for a brand-new, zero-trust Pinterest account), not a linear weight alongside the others — see the skill file's 'competition is a GATE, not an add-on' section.

notes: Non-secret defaults (committed). Secrets live in config/secrets.json (gitignored).
